message:
fix(engine): harden deterministic hashing with length-prefixed encoding and canonical serialization

Replace raw byte concatenation in content_hash and canonical_bytes methods
with length-prefixed field encoding to prevent cross-field boundary collisions.
Switch runtime comparison gate, demo claim linkage gate, and static analysis
graph to canonical serde-JSON hash inputs. Sort blockers, claim results, and
reproducibility results before hashing to ensure input-order independence.
Expand ReproducibilityPack verify_integrity to validate pack_id, manifest hash,
dependency hash, schema versions, and counts. Fix timescale separation
certificate tiebreaker ordering for deterministic fast/slow assignment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
